column6: Clear filter button visible when no filter active — CSS display:inline-flex overrides HTML hidden attribute
column7: ema-debugger: symptom: Clear filters button visually shown when scope is All activities and search is empty → root cause: CSS .clear-filters-button { display: inline-flex } in author stylesheet overrides [hidden] { display: none } from UA stylesheet → fix: added .clear-filters-button[hidden] { display: none } rule in styles.css → verification: PASS — 30/31 tests passing (1 pre-existing failure)
column8: Bug fixed — root cause identified and verified with 30 tests passing
column10: Time saved ≈ 50-60% — AI traced CSS cascade conflict and identified root cause in minutes; developer still validates visual rendering in browser (~15min AI-assisted vs ~30min manual)
